message:
Remove obsolete CONFIG_BIGNUM and CONFIG_VERSION flags from QuickJS build

- CONFIG_BIGNUM is not used in quickjs-ng (was from Bellard's fork)
- CONFIG_VERSION is also not needed
- Remove NO_OS_SUPPORT which had no effect

Note: Claude Code bundle still fails to parse in WASM mode with
"SyntaxError: unexpected token in expression: ''" despite:
- Native quickjs-ng (cmake or clang built) parsing it correctly
- Null-terminated buffers being used
- 2GB WASM memory allocation

The issue appears to be specific to the WASM32-WASI target.
Investigation continues.
